import Mathlib
import Aesop

set_option maxHeartbeats 0
open BigOperators Real Nat Topology Rat Filter
theorem hoelder_inequality_finite {n : ‚Ąē} {p q : ‚ĄĚ} (hp_gt_one : 1 < p) (hpq_conj : 1 / p + 1 / q = 1)
    (őľ őĹ : Fin n ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ) (hőľ_nonneg : ‚ąÄ i, 0 ‚Č§ őľ i) (hőĹ_nonneg : ‚ąÄ i, 0 ‚Č§ őĹ i) :
    ‚ąĎ i, őľ i * őĹ i ‚Č§ (‚ąĎ i, (őľ i) ^ p) ^ (1 / p) * (‚ąĎ i, (őĹ i) ^ q) ^ (1 / q) := by sorry

proof_steps.natural_language:
We assume:
‚ÄĘ p > 1 [tc_2]
‚ÄĘ q = p / (p-1) [tc_3]
Therefore, we conclude:
‚ÄĘ 1/p + 1/q = 1 [l1].
proof_steps.lean_tactics:
have hq_eq : q = p / (p - 1) := by
  field_simp [ne_of_gt hp_gt_one,
    (by rintro rfl; simp [inv_zero, hp_gt_one.ne.symm] at hpq_conj)] at hpq_conj ‚äĘ
  rw [mul_sub_one, sub_eq_iff_eq_add, mul_comm, hpq_conj]

import Mathlib
import Aesop

set_option maxHeartbeats 0
open BigOperators Real Nat Topology Rat Filter
theorem hoelder_inequality_finite {n : ‚Ąē} {p q : ‚ĄĚ} (hp_gt_one : 1 < p) (hpq_conj : 1 / p + 1 / q = 1)
    (őľ őĹ : Fin n ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ) (hőľ_nonneg : ‚ąÄ i, 0 ‚Č§ őľ i) (hőĹ_nonneg : ‚ąÄ i, 0 ‚Č§ őĹ i) :
    ‚ąĎ i, őľ i * őĹ i ‚Č§ (‚ąĎ i, (őľ i) ^ p) ^ (1 / p) * (‚ąĎ i, (őĹ i) ^ q) ^ (1 / q) := by
 have hq_eq : q = p / (p - 1) := by
  field_simp [ne_of_gt hp_gt_one,
    (by rintro rfl; simp [inv_zero, hp_gt_one.ne.symm] at hpq_conj)] at hpq_conj ‚äĘ
  rw [mul_sub_one, sub_eq_iff_eq_add, mul_comm, hpq_conj]
